focus_desc: %1$s I focus on developing cross-platform applications with Kotlin KMP and Compose Multiplatform (CMP), creating user-friendly experiences that meet client requirements, while paying close attention to detail %2$s , scalability %3$s and performance %4$s .
profile_about_desc: Ahoy there! %1$s I'm a passionate Multiplatform Software Developer who started my journey building Android applications with XML. %2$s Curious by nature, I quickly expanded my interests to modern technologies and everything related to cross-platform and multiplatform development. %3$s Today, I focus on creating efficient applications that run across multiple platforms using modern tools like Kotlin Multiplatform. %4$s With a Master's degree in Information Systems and Software Engineering %5$s, I proudly work as a Software Engineer driven by technology and innovation.

education_zeal_desc: Pursuing B.E. in Information Technology at Savitribai Phule Pune University (SPPU). Worked on web application development using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, and designed database systems using SQL. Familiar with software development methodologies and project management practices including Agile and Waterfall.
